title: TheWaystones
description: Waystones is an advanced teleportation plugin that allows players to create custom teleport points in the world
body:
Waystones is an advanced teleportation plugin that allows players to create custom teleport points in the world. The plugin includes:

## ✨ MAIN FEATURES:

8 different variants of waystones
Interactive GUI system
Granular permission control
Combat protection
Configurable XP consumption
Multiple visibility types
Support for multiple dimensions
Customizable cooldown system
Visual and sound effects
Robust database with backups

## 🎯 GOAL:
To facilitate fast travel across the world while maintaining game balance through configurable restrictions.

## 🛠️ INSTALLATION AND CONFIGURATION
### 📦 INSTALLATION:

Download the Waystones-1.0.0.jar file
Place it in your server's /plugins/ folder
Restart the server
The plugin will automatically generate the configuration files

### 📁 GENERATED FILES:
/plugins/Waystones/config.yml (main configuration)
/plugins/Waystones/waystones.yml (waystone data)
/plugins/Waystones/players.yml (player data)
/plugins/Waystones/backups/ (automatic backups)

## 🔧 BASIC CONFIGURATION:
Edit config.yml to customize:
Waystone limits per player/server
XP consumption for teleportation
Teleportation cooldowns
Forbidden dimensions
Custom messages
